system.description:
Intense Radstorm really ratchets up the terrifying, all-consuming nature of the Nuclear Type, making it a truly oppressive and smothering weather to find oneself in. Particularly, Nuclear-Type creatures are supercharged here, making them almost terrifyingly effective combatants against basically everything else.

Effects:

  • At the end of their Activation, non-Steel- and Nuclear-Type creatures lose two Ticks of HP.
  • Nuclear-Type creatures gain 50% to their Movement Allowances each Round, their SPD is increased 50%.
  • At the end of each round, non-Nuclear-Type creatures have one of their Abilities randomly Nullified 7.
  • At the end of each round, Nuclear-Type creatures gain a Tick of HP and a Tick of PP.
  • Non-Steel- and Nuclear-Type creatures are Blinded and Stunted.
  • Steel-Type Attacks have a 25% chance to inflict Unlucky 5. Attacks that would already cause Unlucky 5 instead increase their chance to cause Unlucky by 25%.
  • Nuclear-Type Attacks have a 50% chance to inflict Unlucky 5. Attacks that would already cause Unlucky 5 instead increase their chance to cause Unlucky by 50%.
